messages.raw_user_text: I’m low energy and hungry. I had an apple, but still both conditions.
messages.notes: Hunger and low-energy report after training block.

messages.raw_user_text: Low carb tortilla and three slices of smoked salmon!
messages.notes: Snack chosen in response to hunger.

messages.raw_user_text: I’ve decided to have some pizza for dinner. I’m planning on a couple slices and some extra protein
messages.notes: Planned pizza dinner with added protein.

messages.raw_user_text: Ok, I had two slices worth. It’s cut funny. I have chili and lengua. No more smoked salmon. What’s the plan here?
messages.notes: Pizza consumed; seeking guidance on additional food.

messages.raw_user_text:
After a cup of chili I was satisfied.

An interesting note. After eating I felt so much better. I was totally exhausted from about 11 am. Even with the snack this afternoon, I didn’t pick up. Only after all the carbs did I feel better. I’m going to bed early tonight.
messages.notes: Notable recovery observation: carbs appeared to resolve fatigue.

messages.raw_user_text:
Rest day!
Brekky musashi protein bar
Lunch jerk chicken, drum and thigh. Hamburger patty. Green beans.
Scale was up a little, 199. I’m not surprised. The workout was hard and there is a lot of salt in pizza. I slept a lot, I’m feeling dramatically better. I’ll be ready to hit the gym tomorrow.
Brekky: 3 eggs, 1/2 English muffin with a tsp of jam, heap of mushrooms
Lunch: small pork ribs, no sauce. 1.5 cups veggies. 200g mix of: beef mince, beef and bean chili, 1 tablespoon refried beans, salsa, lots of pickled jalapenos
Snacks: handful of beef jerky
Dinner: I put 400g raw turkey, 2 eggs and a heap of mushrooms in an air fryer. I don’t know what it cooked down to, but I ate 2/3 of what was in there at the end with a tablespoon of bbq sauce.
Oh, I had a bunch of grapes too. I don’t know how many, maybe a fist and a half?
Rest day today!
Brekky: 4 eggs, heap of mushrooms, 2 ham slices and tsp avocado
Lunch: 1.5 cup veggies, 1 cup orange chicken, 125g steak, salsa
Snack: handful of beef jerky
Ok 8 nuggets and three slices of smoked salmon
Another week, another weigh in log!
messages.notes: Associated image of handwritten weight records.

messages.raw_user_text: So let’s plan a little for today. Skye is sick, tor is bouncing off the walls and the house is a disaster. I hit it hard this morning. Skipped training and cleaned and cleaned. Still more to go!
messages.notes: Skipped training due to family/home demands.

messages.raw_user_text: Lunch: quarter pounder meal, Coke Zero. Medium fries.
Snack: 1 twizzler
Dinner: chili with extra lean beef and turkey mince. 1.5 medium size bowls. 2 slices bread. 2 of my sons chicken nuggets
messages.notes: Comfort-food dinner after busy family day.

messages.raw_user_text: And the house is clean and laundry is done! And errands are done! It’s easier to focus on training when the house is in order.
messages.notes: Observation linking household order and training focus.

messages.raw_user_text:
Good workout. It was xfit; but very hyrox appropriate. 5 rounds of 2 squat cleans and 1 push jerk, increasing weight up to 80 kg.
Then:
1000 m run
15 clean and jerk @ 70kg
-------
3 rounds
15 t2b
15kb swings overhead 24kg
--------
15 clean and jerk @ 70kg
1000m run

26:30 minutes
I feel pretty good. I opened with a 4:30 km, but ended the workout near the back of the pack. I was the only Rx, no one else did more than 50kg in the cleans
I felt like I kept up my pace the whole time pretty nicely, until the last km. I just couldn’t go as fast as the lighter bar folks. My legs were lead at that point. It was a 6 min km.
Brekky: Thursday usual 1 biscuit with gravy and 2 eggs
Small beef jerky snack
Lunch: bibimbap bowl. Very light on rice, mostly chicken, beef, veggies and 3 eggs. Total weight 650g

I had a small chili and 1 piece of bread.
And a big twizzlers. For morale.

Coaching was fun, lots of movement, running about with kids, and jumping for an hour.
Afterwards there was a family picnic with our friends.
Small rice and bulgolgi. Maybe 150g total. Sweet potato in puff pastry and beef mince in puff pastry. Each a half fist. And some Grapes
Great xfit today. 3 back to back AMRAPs. Can you read the board?

You got it right! I did men’s Rx. We had to stop at 5 min into the last round cause class ran out of time.
I subbed c2b for bmu

Yes, I had two people including my partner say my running has really improved, and ‘wow you have a lot of energy!’ Those are new responses. I’m also more consistent in the heavy muscular work, which I think is mostly due to my engine improving and strength maintaining.

Food report.
Brekky: musashi protein bar. I wasn’t hungry.
Lunch: 1 cup fruit, 120g steak, 1 hamburger patty, 1 half an extended hand size of chicken. Maybe 1/2 inch thick.
Dinner: 1/2 abe low carb bagel, 4 pieces smoked salmon
I’m going to see Totoro in theaters with my family tonight and am really looking forward to popcorn.
Perfect. Help me dial in the size. More or less?

A couple interesting notes from yesterday. I probably ate too much popcorn. The salt was like a dopamine hit straight to my nervous system. Oh my god, it was incredible!

Then slept A LOT. So did the rest of my family. Kid got up at 5 am, it took til 6 to get him back to sleep, then we all slept til like 10. I weighed in lower again, 198.8
messages.notes: Popcorn overconsumption observation, long sleep, weigh-in.

messages.raw_user_text: Half Abe low carb bagel, 3 slices smoked salmon for Brekky
It’s a rest day today! And I do have a bbq tonight to say goodbye to some friends moving away
Cool. I’m not going to drink at the bbq. The alcohol is consistently not worth it during this cut, I’ll have other nice non alcoholic drinks. It’s not the same as camping whiskey.
Ok, lunch. 1.5 cups chili, 2 eggs, mission low carb tortilla, and 1 large twizzler

Ok, bbq.
Long drive out. Had a musashi bar and some beef jerky.
Then at the bbq, one sausage and a piece of bread. I wanted a treat so I had another musashi bar.

For absolutely no reason I can see, I slept horrible last night. I didn’t fall asleep til about 3 am.

We will see if that causes an effect on the week. I’ll probably take a nap later
Got it. Weighed in low this morning, 197.4.
Today’s workout. Finished in 53 minutes. I had a twizzler before to prep
messages.notes: HYROX-style workout shown in image; Twizzler pre-workout.

messages.raw_user_text: I didn’t end up eating anything last night. Tor had a super hard time falling asleep and it really threw off the evening. I kind of went straight to bed. Then EVERYONE in the house couldn’t sleep.
messages.notes: Missed dinner due to family sleep disruption.
